design_strategy.overview: Non-traditional Bento / Control Room Grid. Discard the stack of white cards. The 'Current State + Actions' zone is the absolute hero, visually distinct through stark contrast (dark or high-saturation background) and oversized, brightly colored transition CTAs.
design_strategy.layout_grid: 12-column bento. Left (lg:col-span-8) for deep content (Brief, Versions, Activity). Right (lg:col-span-4) acts as a sticky 'Command Center' containing the Hero Action Hub, Meta, and Status History.
design_strategy.spacing: Generous and asymmetrical. Use p-8 or p-12 for major content zones. Nested elements get tighter p-4 to p-6.

font_families.headings: Cabinet Grotesk, Clash Display, or Inter (Bold, tight tracking)
font_families.body: IBM Plex Sans or Inter (Highly legible)

request_header.structure: Fluid header spanning col-span-12. No card wrapper, directly on page background.
elements: Top-right header actions: Grouped as icon buttons (Urgent Flame, Edit, Delete, Print, Back).
Title row: Request Number in Mono font + Type Title + Icon.
Corner Ribbon: Absolute positioned top-right for LEAD City (colored based on city code).
Badges: URGENT (pulsing red flame), Tight Timeline (amber), Age pill.
Meta Row: Dense flex row. Assigned Dept, User Avatar, Lead, Dates.

action_hub_hero.structure: Sticky lg:top-6 in the right column. Rendered as a dark 'Control Panel' (bg-stone-900 rounded-xl p-8) to violently contrast with the light theme page, forcing user attention.
action_hub_hero.current_state: Massive text (text-3xl text-white) + glowing pulse dot matching the state's color.
action_hub_hero.transition_ctas: Huge block buttons (w-full h-14 md:h-16 text-lg font-bold rounded-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 shadow-[0_4px_14px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)]). Colors mapped from dynamic_intents.
action_hub_hero.blocked_states: Render as disabled (opacity-50, grayscale) with Shadcn Tooltip explaining why.

content_zones.requirement_brief: Clean white bento box. Text, comments, and 'Brand Assets' grid (thumbnails with hover overlay for preview/download).
content_zones.work_versions: Vertical timeline of versions. 'Add Version' is a prominent dashed-border dropzone. Each version has an exclusive Approve/Revert button and nested threaded comments with @mentions.
content_zones.production_submission: Conditionally rendered block with high-contrast data pairs (Quantity, Date, Team).
content_zones.status_history: Visual timeline. Include a proportional color bar (h-3 rounded-full flex) where segments represent time spent in each state.
content_zones.comments_activity: Full timeline blending human comments and system events. Include a rich composer at the top or bottom.

micro_interactions.dialogs: Transitions require comments/forms? Open Shadcn Dialogs.

technical_rules.file_types: Use .js files exclusively (React + Tailwind). No .tsx files.
technical_rules.components: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for macro layouts. Use customized Shadcn for micro-interactions (Dialogs, Tooltips, Forms).
technical_rules.testing: All buttons, inputs, links, and actionable elements MUST include data-testid (e.g. data-testid='cta-start-working').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Discard the old white-card stack layout.
2. Implement the 12-column Control Room grid. Place the Action Hub in a sticky right rail.
3. Ensure the Action Hub is visually dominant (use a dark container or a highly saturated border/background) so CTAs are impossible to miss.
4. Bind dynamic colors to workflow transition buttons based on semantic intent (emerald for positive/progress, rose for block/reject, indigo for review).
5. Maintain all existing functionalities (file uploads, @mentions, proportional timeline, production conditional rendering) as specified.
6. Do not use teal (#1B93A4). Stick to Emerald/Forest Green for brand accents.
7. Ensure all interactive components have data-testid attributes.
